## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## MCP Impact

- Tools/resources/prompts changed:
- Structured response changes:
- Transport or hosting changes:

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:mcp`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high`

Call out any GTFS feed, realtime feed, caching, Docker, CI, or publishing assumptions.
